zh.lifeSummary: 當Albreda Haye於0984年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾朋吉奧德莫時，她的父親Ranulf de la Haye24歲，母親Geva or Eva Duceline Crepon15歲。她於1010年與Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o波蒙特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1045年9月20日在法國諾門迪艾波奧蒙吉萊-洛格享年61歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪艾萊斯 普雷奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albreda Haye于0984年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾朋吉奧德莫时，她的父亲Ranulf de la Haye24岁，母亲Geva or Eva Duceline Crepon15岁。她于1010年与Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o波蒙特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1045年9月20日在法国諾門迪艾波奧蒙吉萊-洛格享年61岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪艾萊斯 普雷奧。

nameMeanings.name: Haye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Willi.

North German, East Frisian, and Dutch: from a personal name, Frisian Hajo, ancient Germanic Haio; or from a short form of the female name Hadewig, composed of the elements hadu ‘battle, strife’ + wīg ‘war’.

variants.name: Deshayes
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from the plural of Old French haye ‘hedge’ (see Haye and Hayes ), with fused preposition and definite article des ‘from the’; or a habitational name denoting someone from Les Hayes, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Deshaies .

variants.name: Hayenga
meanings: East Frisian: patronymic from the personal name Hajo (see Haye 1). It is formed with the suffix -enga, a variant of -inga (from the patronymic suffix -ing and genitive plural ending -a).

variants.name: Hey
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hay  .
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized (or archaic) and Flemish, of Heij, a topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, Dutch hei, heide.
German: metonymic occupational name for a grower or mower of grass, from Middle High German höu ‘grass, hay’.

variants.name: Hayen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse.  German Heinz, Wilhelm.
Flemish, East Frisian, and North German: patronymic from   Haye   1.

nameMeanings.name: Albreda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Elfreda  , but now probably taken as a feminine equivalent of   Alfred .

en.lifeSummary: When Albreda Haye was born in 0984, in Pont-Audemer, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Ranulf de la Haye, was 24 and her mother, Geva or Eva Duceline Crepon, was 15. She married Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer in 1010, in Beaumont, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 September 1045, in Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandy, France, at the age of 61, and was buried in Les Préaux, Eure, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albreda Haye est née en 0984, à Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Ranulf de la Haye, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Geva or Eva Duceline Crepon, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer en 1010, à Beaumont, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 septembre 1045, à Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Les Préaux, Eure, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albreda Haye 0984 in Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ranulf de la Haye 24 und ihre Mutter Geva or Eva Duceline Crepon 15. Sie hat 1010 in Beaumont, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. September 1045 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Les Préaux, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albreda Haye è nata il nel 0984 nel Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Ranulf de la Haye, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Geva or Eva Duceline Crepon, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer nel 1010, nel Beaumont, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 settembre 1045, nel Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Les Préaux, Eure, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Albreda Hayeが0984年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアポント-アウデマーで生まれた時，父Ranulf de la Hayeは24歳，母Geva or Eva Duceline Creponは15歳であった。1010年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメビーウモントでHonfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1045年9月20日にフランスノーマンディエウアビーウモント-レ-ロジャーで61歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディエウアレス プルeアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Albreda Haye(이)가 0984년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 폰트-오데머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulf de la Haye(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Geva or Eva Duceline Crepon(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1010년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 보몽에서 Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1045년 9월 20일 프랑스 노먼디 우르 보몽-레-로거에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 우르 레스 플e오스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albreda Haye nasceu em 0984, em Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Ranulf de la Haye, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Geva or Eva Duceline Crepon, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer em 1010, em Beaumont, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1045, em Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, França, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Les Préaux, Eure, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albreda Haye родилась в 0984 г. в местности понт-аудемир, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Ranulf de la Haye было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Geva or Eva Duceline Crepon, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer в 1010 г. в местности бомонт, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 сентября 1045 г. в местности бомонт-ле-рогир, эур, норманди, Франция в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности лесь прeаукс, эур, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albreda Haye nació en 0984, en Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Ranulf de la Haye, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Geva or Eva Duceline Crepon, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Honfroi Humfridum de Veulles du Ponteaudemer en 1010, en Beaumont, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1045, en Beaumont-le-Roger, Eure, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Les Préaux, Eure, Normandie, Francia.
